info.title: AliExpress Open Platform API
info.description: AliExpress Open Platform provides APIs for sellers, affiliates, dropshippers, and logistics partners to manage products, orders, shipping, payments, and more on the AliExpress marketplace. The API follows the TOP (Taobao Open Platform) gateway pattern where most methods are invoked via a central gateway endpoint with a method parameter.

post.summary: DBS packaging and ship （supports split sub-order）
post.description: You can use this interface to declare the shipment of a single order, and this interface supports the delivery of split orders
You can use this interface to pack and ship 3PL line orders (non-platform logistics orders).

post.summary: Local self pick up declare ship
post.description: This interface supports self-pickup order declaration shipping only for local stores

You can use this interface to modify the shipment records of the Dbs declare Ship interface. Please note that you can only modify it twice within ten days after the first shipment. Also, please do not use this interface to modify platform logistics orders.
Online packaging and shipment.

You can use this interface to query the logistics service information on the order, including logistics service code, logistics service name, and logistics service type (DBS or platform logistics mode). You can use this information to help you decide whether to use the DBS mode or platform logistics mode for shipping this order.
Package available shipping service query
Logistics order creation can be carried out using the current interface, which supports splitting the quantity of sub-orders for shipment

You can use this API to print waybills for packages that have already been packed for platform logistics orders. The returned message is a byte array data encoded in base64. Please use base64 to decode the data in the "bytes" field to obtain the waybill byte data. Please note that this API should not be used to print waybills for DBS orders, and currently only supports printing waybills.

You can use this interface to ship packages that have already been packed for platform logistics orders. After this operation, logistics will come to collect the packages. Please note that this interface should not be used for DBS packages.

You can use this interface to cancel packages that have already been packed for platform logistics orders. After cancellation, you can pack the order again. Please note that this interface should not be used for DBS packages.
You can query the unreachable preferences through this interface.

You can use this interface to query your shipping address and return address. Please use the shipping address ID as the address ID in the input parameter of the platform logistics packaging interface.
You can set the unreachable preference through this interface.
You can use this interface to declare the shipment of a single order, and this interface supports the delivery of split orders

You can use this interface to ship packages that have already been packed for platform logistics orders. After this operation, logistics will come to collect the packages. Please note that this interface should not be used for DBS packages.

post.summary: AE Tax: Invoice Request Query (Seller to Buyer)
post.description: Invoice Issuance Scenario: Provide an API for querying invoice requests, with asynchronous invoicing by the merchant and synchronization to the settlement tax system upon completion.
AEFundOrderDetail

This API supports batch querying of parsed invoice content by main order ID (maximum 20 orders per request).

● If results are returned: The seller has uploaded the invoice
● If no results are returned: The seller has not uploaded the invoice
Brazil seller invoice upload, supports upload of XML format NFE invoices by main order ID.

post.summary: Settlement Tax: Merchant Returns Invoicing Results
post.description: Merchant (ISV Platform) synchronizes the invoicing result to Settlement Tax. Please note! This API can only be called when the invoicing is successful to send back the invoicing information. (Note that when sending back the information, the invoiceStatus variable in your input parameters can only be set to a fixed value, which is "GENERATED_SUCCESS".)

This api is used to delete online products except in the draft box. Please note that there is no reverse way to retrieve the products which have been deleted. Use this API in cautious.

batch product inventory update API for oversea sellers. Sellers could update multiple skus among multiple products in a single call. Maximum 20 products could be updated at the same time and maximum 200 skus could be updated within one product.
